{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181757FB7A06700CBCD0D3D055"}"},"total":1151},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7087453321241756446","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总得来说还不错，后面的节奏虽然快一点，但是其他也是大势所趋了，已经没有多大疑问，写下去就是水数字了，结局很好，总体来说比较完美"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1650176322,"group_id":"6850323017906523150","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6HkD7cKzR9cpzw1kqIaz7I=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"184311433144030","user_name":"风萧萧雨歇歇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"184311433144030","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774674784,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6850323017906523150","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到三国成了刘备之子，可是我不是阿斗！无拳无勇，要如何摆脱即将横死的宿命？幸好我有系统随身！在这乱世随波逐流，去争得那一线生机！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/2b30bc81e99ffc2891f67805e1ac12d5","author":"外城发火","author_id":"","book_id":"6850323017906523150","book_name":"三国：我成了刘备之子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9692人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6850323482656375299","read_count":"9692","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"948040"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"457","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,三国","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/fee10001fa4a077bf00e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445078&x-signature=dVyZUozgdMdjeclQly1BWDq%2FeI4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1451004140199800","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.5457454e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181757FB7A06700CBCD0D3D055"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15456,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1650},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6858190982853394445","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我比较喜欢看历史类小说，特别是三国，看过至少三十来本三国类小说了，作者这本书在我看过的小说里算是名列前茅了，我之前都不太喜欢看有系统的三国小说，因为三国这个舞台有点小，并不是特别适合系统，而且有了系统总会感觉主角是系统的傀儡，但作者的这本书系统没有那种鸠占鹊巢的感觉，非常的不错，内容也是跌宕起伏，引人入胜，对话也是比较有代入感的，但我感觉一些人物的刻画并不是那么鲜明（比如34章刘几来着有些莫名其妙的下跪），当然刻画得栩栩如生的也是有的，其次我认为呢就是奖励机制除了抽奖也可以增加一些别的比如商城之类的，还可以弄一些支线任务或成就，这本书我感觉灰常的不错，作者大大加油😊😘😍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1596797080,"group_id":"6850323017906523150","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3n4QdIgUbE2yBe7YCXKjH/byYpfIH0kX9J6sFogUIaU","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/727cededada948248cfefc5577cd8296~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787598&x-signature=LmPshPNYq9U4T4OQrUtSIukqLMQ%3D","user_id":"2770406235196711","user_name":"寂冠雪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2770406235196711","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6850323017906523150","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到三国成了刘备之子，可是我不是阿斗！无拳无勇，要如何摆脱即将横死的宿命？幸好我有系统随身！在这乱世随波逐流，去争得那一线生机！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/2b30bc81e99ffc2891f67805e1ac12d5","author":"外城发火","author_id":"","book_id":"6850323017906523150","book_name":"三国：我成了刘备之子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9692人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6850323482656375299","read_count":"9692","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"948040"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"457","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,三国","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/fee10001fa4a077bf00e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445078&x-signature=dVyZUozgdMdjeclQly1BWDq%2FeI4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1451004140199800","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181757FB7A06700CBCD0D3D055"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":82,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":29,"show_pv":107796},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1596798806,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7122483240023294752","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很符合我的个人品味。
有人说打斗场面不够精彩，个人口味不同吧，我看到打斗都是跳过看结果的。
书里有外挂，但主角更多的是凭借自己的意志去做事
没有无脑崇拜古人的智慧，也没有盲目贬低古人的见识，很客观平和地在给出解释。
主角没有收集美女的毛病，舒服多了。
原创人物没有，（别的平行历史小说也一样），个人觉得可惜。既然挽救了那么多生命，又发展了教育，那么不出些新的英雄人物，岂不是说明努力并不成功？","text_exts":[{"e":145,"s":141,"text":"历史小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774261078D0D3D055%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227122483240023294752%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226850323017906523150%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1658332511,"group_id":"6850323017906523150","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny8/N8IlG2boYDb8538ks+2w1LJ1odlTnJo3cQp3coYM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e753655180f24c7997edc2fb36c6974c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790639&x-signature=oNElFOREYBvKfwXcr1nZxpvsSmk%3D","user_id":"3711542611150254","user_name":"衔枚lolo"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3711542611150254","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1689395534,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6850323017906523150","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到三国成了刘备之子，可是我不是阿斗！无拳无勇，要如何摆脱即将横死的宿命？幸好我有系统随身！在这乱世随波逐流，去争得那一线生机！","au
